analysis.reasoning: Core message: The tweet accuses the EU and USA of ignoring the harmful effects of their unilateral sanctions on ordinary people, framing these actions as part of a cynical geopolitical game devoid of solidarity and human rights. Evaluation: RU1 (The West and their allies are immoral, hostile and decadent) – Supported. The tweet portrays the West (EU/USA) as immoral and hostile, indifferent to human rights and suffering caused by their sanctions. RU2 – Not supported; no mention of Russia or an alternative system/multilateralism. RU3 – Not supported; no depiction of Russia as benevolent. RU4 – Not supported; no historical content. RU5 – Not supported; no claim of Russia’s current achievements. RU6 – Not supported; no cultural or heritage content. Conclusion: Only RU1 applies.
